title: Chambers Global Guide 2024 recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as Market Leaders
content:
## Chambers Global Guide 2024 recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as Market Leaders
February 15, 2024. Toronto. McCarthy Tétrault’s outstanding client service and strategic legal counsel in key global sectors was once again recognized by Chambers Global Guide . The 2024 edition highlights the firm's international expertise. Chambers awarded the firm more Band 1 lawyer and practice rankings, and more total lawyer and practice rankings than any other Canadian law firm.
In total, McCarthy Tétrault received:
- 13 Band 1 lawyer rankings
- 13 Band 1 practice area rankings
- 84 total lawyer rankings
- 22 practice area rankings
“This recognition underscores McCarthy Tétrault’s deep insight into the industries where Canada takes a global leadership role, and reinforces the trust our clients have in the firm’s expertise,” said Dave Leonard , CEO at McCarthy Tétrault. “We’re committed to delivering strategic, innovative solutions to help our clients achieve their goals wherever their business takes them.”
The firm received Band 1 rankings in the following areas:
- Competition/Antitrust
- Disputes (International & Cross-Border)
- Information Technology
- International & Cross-Border Transactions
- International Trade/WTO
- Mining (International & Cross-Border)
- Projects: PPP & Infrastructure
- Telecommunications & Broadcasting
A full list of the firm’s top-ranked lawyers can be found on our website .
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
